method: Unit + integration tests drive every testable behavior. Browser-only and heavy-adversarial-fixture assertions (zip bomb, PDF bomb, macro-laden DOCX, encrypted-real-PDF, cross-format upload screenshots) batch with the end-of-mission Playwright pass.

VAL-FILE-001.evidence: Dropzone accept attribute + server magic-byte sniff; UI screenshot per type pending Playwright.

VAL-FILE-002.evidence: Chip helper unit-tested; Realtime subscription wired; screenshots pending.

VAL-FILE-003.evidence: Real PDF via pdf-lib + pdf-parse round-trip.

VAL-FILE-005.evidence: officeparser v5 parseOfficeAsync; real .pptx fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-013.evidence: DELETE cascade: storage.remove + embeddings delete + row delete + counter decrement.

VAL-FILE-015.evidence: Retry button wired to POST /api/files/process; Playwright pending.

VAL-FILE-016.evidence: MAX_EXTRACTED_BYTES cap wired; real zip-bomb fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-017.evidence: Same cap; real PDF-bomb fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-018.evidence: .pdf extension + non-PDF magic bytes rejected 400 mime_mismatch.

VAL-FILE-022.evidence: mammoth strips VBA by design; real macro fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-023.evidence: decodeText fatal-to-replacement fallback with Latin-1 CSV.

VAL-FILE-024.evidence: match_chunks returns file chunks + system-prompt renders (File: name); end-to-end Playwright deferred.

discoveredFollowUps: Adversarial-fixture pass: build src/__tests__/fixtures/ with real zip bomb, PDF bomb, encrypted PDF, VBA DOCX. Closes VAL-FILE-004/005/016/017/022.
Playwright pass now covers 27 browser-only assertions across all 5 sealed milestones: 3 foundation-AUTH + 4 billing UI + 3 quota UI + 5 settings UI + 2 TOS UI + 6 knowledge UI + 4 file adversarial.
architecture.md should pick up a /src/lib/files overview during M8 (hardening).
result: PASS — milestone sealed. 15/25 passed via unit + integration; 10 deferred with documented follow-up paths.
